# icinga2_downtime (Resource)

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `author` (String) Name of the author.
- `comment` (String) Comment text.
- `end_time` (Number) Unix timestamp marking the end of the downtime.
- `filter` (String) [Filter](https://icinga.com/docs/icinga-2/latest/doc/12-icinga2-api/#icinga2-api-filters) to apply the downtime.
- `start_time` (Number) Unix timestamp marking the beginning of the downtime.
- `type` (String) Type of downtime (Host or Service).

### Optional

- `all_services` (Boolean) Optional for host downtimes. Sets downtime for all services for the matched host objects. If child_options are set, all child hosts and their services will schedule a downtime too. Defaults to false.
- `child_options` (String) Schedule child downtimes. DowntimeNoChildren does not do anything, DowntimeTriggeredChildren schedules child downtimes triggered by this downtime, DowntimeNonTriggeredChildren schedules non-triggered downtimes. Defaults to DowntimeNoChildren.
- `duration` (Number) Required for flexible downtimes. Duration of the downtime in seconds if fixed is set to false.
- `fixed` (Boolean) Defaults to true. If true, the downtime is fixed otherwise flexible
- `trigger_name` (String) Sets the trigger for a triggered downtime.

### Read-Only

- `last_updated` (String)
- `names` (List of String)
